questionHtml: Describe why iron is the heaviest element that can be produced by nuclear fusion processes inside stars.
markschemeHtml:
the binding energy per nucleon is a maximum for iron ✔

formation of heavier elements than iron by fusion is not energetically possible ✔

NOTE: For MP2 some reference to energy is needed

meta.title: Describe why iron is the heaviest element that can be produced by nuclear fusion processes inside stars.
